title: guajava albida
intro: Guajava albida, also known as White Guava or Guava, is a tropical tree native to Central and South America, belonging to the Myrtaceae family. The medicinal properties of Guajava albida lie in its bark, leaves, and fruit, which have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Guajava albida include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Guajava albida can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, tinctures, and capsules, to harness its medicinal properties and provide natural remedies for various health concerns.
